name: Bucketeer
description: Open-source feature flag management and A/B testing platform created by CyberAgent, supporting 100M+ users with billions of flag evaluations per month.

seo.title: Bucketeer — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: Bucketeer: Open-source feature flag management and A/B testing platform created by CyberAgent, supporting 100M+ users with billions of flag evaluations per mont

when_to_use: A/B experimentation platform with statistical significance
Targeting flags to user cohorts and account segments
Kill switch for instant flag disable during incidents
Audit trail of flag changes with automated compliance logs

pros: A/B testing built in, not bolted on
cons: Smaller community than LaunchDarkly or Unleash
Docs thinner in English than Japanese
UI less polished than SaaS competitors
review.verdict: Credible OSS flags platform for large engineering orgs willing to run it; most teams should start with Unleash.
review.best_for: Large orgs self-hosting flags with heavy evaluation loads
review.not_for: Small teams that want a simple SaaS flag dashboard
